# Decorat Al Ahlam (ديكورات الأحلام)

> Specialized in modern interior decorations and finishing in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

Decorat Al Ahlam provides interior design and decoration services for homes, villas, offices and retail spaces in Riyadh. The team uses high-quality materials and professional craftsmanship for modern, durable finishes.

## Core Services

- Gypsum board ceilings and walls
- Marble-alternative wall cladding
- Modern and classic wallpaper installation
- German and Turkish parquet flooring
- Wood and chipboard wall cladding
- Integrated interior design and finishing

## Contact

- Website: https://decoratalahlam.com/
- Phone and WhatsApp: +966531169312
- Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
